# VER — Vertical / niche mechanics

Genus: **Verticalis**

Whether the strategy fits the niche or industry.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H358 | *Verticalis storyformis* var. h358-saas-convert-they | SaaS / software | SaaS videos convert better when they show the workflow pain before the feature. | MIX | M-VER |
| H359 | *Verticalis textualis* var. h359-screen-recordings-need | SaaS / software | Screen recordings need mobile-safe zooms and annotations to avoid UI blindness. | MIX | M-VER |
| H360 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h360-comparison-against-workflow | SaaS / software | Comparison against an old workflow makes value clearer than listing features. | MIX | M-VER |
| H361 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h361-study-saves-delivered | Education / study | Study content saves better when delivered as a repeatable method, not motivation. | SAV | M-VER |
| H362 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h362-worked-examples-outperform | Education / study | Worked examples outperform abstract advice for technical learning. | MIX | M-VER |
| H363 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h363-spaced-review-prompts | Education / study | Spaced/review prompts increase follows if the account promises a continuing learning sequence. | FOL | M-VER |
| H367 | *Verticalis primafacialis* var. h367-food-stop-scroll | Food / cooking | Food videos stop scroll with final dish or texture, not ingredient setup. | MIX | M-VER |
| H369 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h369-effort-framing-increases | Food / cooking | One-pan/low-effort framing increases sends because the recipient category is obvious. | SND | M-VER |
| H379 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h379-travel-save-framed | Travel | Travel videos save better when framed as itinerary/useful route, not only scenery. | SAV | M-VER |
| H380 | *Verticalis probatoria* var. h380-hidden-framing-increases | Travel | Hidden-gem framing increases shares but needs proof of accessibility/cost to earn saves. | SAV | M-VER |
| H381 | *Verticalis primafacialis* var. h381-travel-frames-should | Travel | Travel first frames should show the most distinctive place-specific visual immediately. | MIX | M-VER |
| H385 | *Verticalis primafacialis* var. h385-process-stop-scroll | Art / design | Art process videos stop scroll with either final work or a dramatic transformation moment. | MIX | M-VER |
| H387 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h387-before-after-design | Art / design | Before/after design videos save better when the design rule is extracted at the end. | SAV | M-VER |
| H394 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h394-should-lead-business | B2B / professional services | B2B videos should lead with business pain, not creator personality. | MIX | M-VER |
| H395 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h395-case-studies-convert | B2B / professional services | Case studies convert better when the constraint, intervention and outcome are all visible. | MIX | M-VER |
| H396 | *Verticalis probatoria* var. h396-authority-needs-original | B2B / professional services | Authority content needs original frameworks or data, not generic tips. | MIX | M-VER |
| H397 | *Verticalis actionalis* var. h397-career-save-they | Career / job / study life | Career videos save better when they include scripts, templates or checklists. | SAV | M-VER |
| H398 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h398-life-retain-framed | Career / job / study life | Day-in-the-life videos retain better when framed by a concrete lesson or tension. | MIX | M-VER |
| H399 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h399-interview-resume-tips | Career / job / study life | Interview/resume tips share better when aimed at a specific recipient category. | SND | M-VER |
| H400 | *Verticalis storyformis* var. h400-local-service-convert | Local services | Local service videos convert better when they show the messy before state first. | MIX | M-VER |
| H401 | *Verticalis textualis* var. h401-geographic-labels-improve | Local services | Geographic labels improve qualified discovery but may narrow total reach. | MIX | M-VER |
| H402 | *Verticalis verticalis* var. h402-customer-question-build | Local services | Customer question videos build trust more efficiently than promo videos. | TRU | M-VER |
